reviews.review_description: I would like to see a lot more come to this game but for a demo 5 stars everything I would expect from a early release I fly fish and fish irl I wish the fish were bigger and the little ones didn’t fight as hard they fight like a 30 inch wild brown but  makes it fun at the same time and I would also like to be able to nymph as well with a indicator and some realistic dry flys and nymphs it would be cool to shve different hatches go on throughout the game as well as a money system in the main game but great game for a demo

Wonderful!
 
It reminds me of my younger days of wading with a fly rod in my hands!

(Now I fish in a chair)

The mechanics remind me of casting with a real rod, as does bringing the fish in.

Thanks for the demo!
I look forward to more

Catdok.2024

Aside from only getting fish to bite on the furthest  left area on the side of the big rock this game is awesome for a demo.  I fly fish irl a lot and on days that I cant get out I play this to get my fix.  I hope the developer can get a full game out soon because if its anything like the demo I will buy it.

This is a very awesome game, I've personally have experience with fly fishing and even tho these stuff you can still work on the hand physics and stuff this is still an awesome game.

Stuff I would love to see in the future of this game would be new rods, multiplayer, locomotion and the ability to customize your avatar, rod or reel and new fish . But I know you are a single developer so take your time and keep making awesome things

reviews.review_title: This is actually a horrible game
reviews.review_description: It’s not very often I find a game I just don’t like but this is definitely one. I’ve spent around 3 hours of playtime in game and haven’t caught anything. I’m aware it’s supposed to be “realistic and not easy” but this honestly isn’t even fun. I have to recast every 3 seconds and I have yet to get a single bite and I’ve been casting in the spots it has on the map. Sadly this is a 1 star game for me I won’t be playing unless they manage to make some major game changing updates.

developer_response.body:
Chill :)
1. It's a free demo of a work in progress game
2. I've never heard of 0 bite, so you may have found a bug, it's better to report it, send me a message in this case, so I can investigate
3. I'm a solo dev on this so yes it's not perfect, it needs improvments on all fronts, but that's why the demo is there so people can give me feedbacks

As you said it's not a casual fishing game, but in this demo if you do 30 casts in front of you you will get a bite automatically, no need for fly presentation, good cast or a good timing, it will happen. Give it another try and don't be that mad about a demo. Cheers

reviews.review_description:
this is awesome. 2 hand use for euro nymph and sub surface streamer fishing would be super awesome.....

if it was only casting some delicate drys....well i appreciate that as well. 

as someone who fishes 200+ days a year, i think this has LOTS of potential
good but i can’t get any fish to bite and also idk why the training doesn’t work but it’s really good for demo
When a fish bites and when I reel the fish in it just get off the rod

developer_response.body: You need to hook it when it bites, pull the rod as soon as you feel a knock

reviews.review_description: It takes a hour or to figure it out but once you do it’s very fun
Very fun demo and realistic fly fishing simulation, had a lot of fun!
